title: croton fragilis
intro: Croton fragilis, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Croton fragilis include tinctures, extracts, and salves, which are often used to treat various conditions, including wounds, gastrointestinal issues, and respiratory problems.
